closure_rule: Do not treat the full FRAT surface as replayed by the legacy rank analyzer. Use the FRAT surface classifier plus extracted-LRAT verification until a bounded FRAT analyzer or standalone FRAT checker is supplied.
reason: The inherited degree-5 route-rank analyzer enumerates combinations over full proof routes. The FRAT surface contains 214 proof-line events, which makes the legacy route-rank stage combinatorially infeasible.
